testcase.name: test_staff_clock_in_out
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features.py:194: in test_staff_clock_in_out assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_incident
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features.py:626: in test_create_incident assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to create incident: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create incident: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","title"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"description":"Test incident - dog escaped from kennel","severity":"high","dog_ids":[]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","location_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"description":"Test incident - dog escaped from kennel","severity":"high","dog_ids":[]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_update_incident
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features.py:651: in test_update_incident incident_id = create_response.json()["id"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'id'

testcase.name: test_delete_incident
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features.py:670: in test_delete_incident incident_id = create_response.json()["id"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'id'
